backend/main.mo: Motoko actor implementing an ICDex grid trading bot with order placement/cancellation, bot start/stop via recurring timers, configurable spread/grid parameters, and an activity log with paginated query support.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming that useQueries.ts and OpenOrdersPanel.tsx were updated to call the backend `pending` method for fetching open orders.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference for the frontend codebase structure and component responsibilities.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base stylesheet defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark themes, covering background, foreground, card, border, chart, and sidebar color tokens.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point that mounts the React app into a `#root` div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that composes the full dashboard layout with a sticky header, three-row responsive grid of panels (control, config, market data, grid preview, open orders, trade history, activity log), and a footer.
frontend/src/components/ActivityLogPanel: React panel component that fetches and displays paginated bot activity log entries with color-coded event types, loading skeletons, error state, and empty state.
React panel for controlling the trading bot, showing running/stopped status with a pulsing indicator, config summary (spread, numOrders, interval), and Start/Stop buttons with loading and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ConfigurationPan: Renders a configuration form for bot settings (spread, grid orders, refresh interval) with validation, loading skeletons, and a save handler that currently simulates a save since backend config is read-only.
frontend/src/components/GridPreviewTable: Displays a scrollable table of current grid price levels split into buy/sell sides, with a computed mid price, loading skeletons, error state, and a manual refresh button.
Shows the derived mid price (ICP/ckUSDT) from the latest grid data along with a live/idle/stale/error status badge and a relative-time freshness indicator.
Lists open orders sorted by side and price with buy/sell counts, supports a cancel-all action via mutation, and shows loading skeletons and error states.
frontend/src/components/TradeHistoryPane: Displays a reverse-chronological trade history table with price, quantity, status (filled/cancelled/open), and relative timestamps, including loading and error states.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication on ICP, wrapping DFINITY's AuthClient to handle login, logout, and persisted identity state with status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for interacting with the trading bot backend actor, covering bot status, config, open orders, trade history, activity log, and mutations for start/stop/cancel operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that sets up a terminal-themed dark UI using Tailwind CSS with JetBrains Mono font, OKLCH color tokens for trading semantics (buy/sell/warning), and custom scrollbar styles.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with terminal/trading-specific colors (buy, sell, neutral, running, stopped), JetBrains Mono fonts, OKLCH-based semantic color tokens, and custom box shadows.
project_state.json: Project state manifest tracking the ICDex Grid Trading Bot's existing features, pending feature requests (grid loop, order placement, PnL, balance verification), and architectural notes at schema version 1.0.0.
